name: Oriental Rice
recipeIngredient: 8 oz Can sliced bamboo shoots, drained
2 cups Cooked shrimp, ham or chicken (or combination)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large frying pan or wok, heat oil over medium-high heat.
2. Add scallions and cook for 30 seconds, stirring until wilted.
3. Add the remaining ingredients, except butter, to the pan.
4. Cook and stir everything together for 2 minutes.
5. Remove from heat.
6. Stir in butter.
